title: vYtka Steampunk
description: Add 15 steampunk items to your Minecraft.
body:
# Russian language resource pack for Minecraft

## Attention!

In the downloaded file, be sure to read the "read me" file.

Without Optifine/Sodium and the corresponding mods, the resource pack will not work.

All items that contain the letter "Ё" must be written only with "Ё".

ALL items start with a capital letter.

Carefully check the renaming, if the renaming occurs manually, otherwise, the item replacement will not work.

If you choose Sodium, all mods must be on the same version and on the same platform.

To facilitate the viewing of all renamings, it is recommended to install the mod. [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) to the corresponding version.

**The resource pack will be supplemented and updated in the future..**

## **Mods for installation:**

**(There are mods for Fabric-Sodium in the archive for the version 1.20.1).**

[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

[Custom Entity Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem)

[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[CompleteConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig)

[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)

[Nuit (formerly FabricSkyboxes)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)

[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)

[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

[ModMenu Badges Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-badges-lib)

[Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)

[RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
